violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -Employees with beards not wearing beard nets.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cook line sanitizer buckets were at 0ppm Quat.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Plant was found in front hand sink by beverage area -Lettuce debris in handsink by dishwashing area

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service * items may occur. -Pack of cigarettes were found next to sous vide machine.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Bottom drawer cooler by grill had chicken and beef at 50-54F. Food items were discarded by staff. Cooler was found to unplugged. Cooler was re-plugged in by staff.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
